# Render one or more source logos from a pipe-separated string (Generated by Claude Opus 4.6 with some manual tweaks)

Render one or more source logos from a pipe-separated string (Generated
by Claude Opus 4.6 with some manual tweaks)

## Usage

``` r
render_source_logos()
```

## Arguments

- value:

  A string with source database names separated by "\|" (e.g.
  "civic\|oncokb"), or NA/empty string for no sources.

## Value

An HTML div element containing the corresponding logos, or an empty
string if no valid sources.
